LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS CRYSTAL LEI AND TONY FU'S JOINT MOTION TO COMPEL AND FOR SANCTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS TAT MAN KONG AND KELVIN HE AND THEIR COUNSEL IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO THE DEPOSITION SUBPOENA HAS BEEN WAIVED. ANY AND ALL DOCUMENTS MUST BE SERVED ON PLAINTIFFS NOT LATER THAN 10 DAYS AFTER ENTRY OF THE ORDER ON THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS HAVE NOT MADE A PROPER SHOWING OF THEIR ENTITLEMENT TO SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF MUST APPEAR AT THE HEARING AND PRESENT AN ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE THAT IS CONSISTENT WITH THIS RULING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND APPROVED AS TO FORM BY COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANTS. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Joint Notice Of Motion, Joint Motion To Compel And For Sanction Against Defendants Tat Man Kong And Kelvin He And Their Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Crystal Lei telephone number 415-221-0969 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Tony Fu telephone number 415-867-5973 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Jeffrey Chen of Law Offices of Jeffrey A. Chen telephone number 415-369-9089 for Defendants.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS CRYSTAL LEI and TONY FU's Joint Motion To Compel And For Sanction Against Defendants Tat Man Kong And Kelvin He And Their Counsel is granted in part and denied in part. Defendant's objection to the Deposition subpoena has been waived. Any and all documents must be served on Plaintiffs not later than 10 days after entry of the order on this motion. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Plaintiffs have not made a proper showing of their entitlement to sanctions. Plaintiff must appear at the hearing and present an Order for the court's signature that is consistent with this ruling. Order signed in open Court and approved as to form by Counsel for the Defendants.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
